description: Feature-engineered dataset derived from NYC Yellow Taxi data, used for traffic congestion prediction

target.name: congestion_level
target.description: Traffic congestion level derived from average trip speed

features.name: trip_distance
features.description: Distance of the trip in miles

features.name: hour
features.description: Hour of the day when the trip started (0–23)

excluded_features.name: avg_speed
excluded_features.reason: Directly used to derive congestion_level → causes data leakage

excluded_features.name: trip_duration
excluded_features.reason: Can be used to reconstruct avg_speed → indirect data leakage

data_quality_rules: valid timestamps for pickup and dropoff
valid geographic coordinates for pickup and dropoff

data_layers.raw: Azure container storing original ingested parquet files
data_layers.processed: Cleaned and validated dataset after ETL
data_layers.curated: Feature-engineered dataset used for machine learning
data_layers.predictions: Model output predictions stored after batch inference

pipeline_notes: Dataset processed in chunks due to large size (~1.7GB)
Parquet format used for efficient storage and processing
Feature engineering performed after ETL to ensure clean inputs
Model training excludes leakage-prone features to ensure realistic evaluation
